title: Rapid ransomware containment - Illumio
content:
Isolate one or more workloads based on traffic flows to a given port/protocol.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Illumio pack (Illumio, partner-supported).

Inputs — Port: Provide Port to be blocked.; Protocol: Protocol of Port.; allow_traffic: Do you want to search for traffic on this port before the incident to allow? (Yes or No); update_enforcement_mode: Do you want to update the enforcement mode?(Yes or No).

Integrations/scripts used: Print, illumio-enforcement-boundary-create, illumio-ip-lists-get, illumio-object-provision, illumio-rule-create, illumio-ruleset-create, illumio-service-binding-create, illumio-traffic-analysis, illumio-virtual-service-create, illumio-workloads-list.
